Current role: unknown to me — night memory is blank, which means either no action targeted me or I lack visibility into it. Standard Bayesian setup: prior probability of <Werewolf> in 6-player game with 2 wolves in center is 2/6 ≈ 33%. But center composition unknown.

Everyone with a night action — state your role, target, and exact result. No feelings. Just the likelihood ratios. Villagers with no action: say '<Villager>, no action' so we can count null claims. Order: Prosecutor, Therapist, Chaos Agent, Gut Player, Underdog. Go.
